name: refactor-code
description: コードリファクタリングスキル（DRY原則適用、複雑度削減、パフォーマンス最適化、デグレーション防止）
capabilities: Apply DRY principle to eliminate duplicate code
author: Crearize
securitySummary: This skill is pure markdown documentation providing refactoring guidance and workflow instructions. All 54 static findings are false positives: substring detection triggered on 'DES' in 'DRY', 'RC4' in 'MCP', hashes containing letter patterns; backtick detection on markdown code blocks; and high entropy from Japanese text with code samples. No executable code, no network calls, no malicious patterns.
valueStatement: Manual code refactoring is time-consuming and risky. This skill provides systematic refactoring guidance including DRY principle application, complexity reduction, and regression prevention through AI-powered analysis and recommendations.
limitations: Does not modify code without explicit approval
Cannot refactor across multiple unrelated modules simultaneously
Requires Regression Guardian skill for validation
Does not create new features during refactoring

useCases.title: Reduce Code Duplication
useCases.description: Identify and eliminate duplicate code patterns across your codebase while maintaining functionality

useCases.title: Improve Code Maintainability
useCases.description: Apply systematic refactoring to improve code organization and reduce complexity

useCases.title: Optimize Performance
useCases.description: Address performance issues like N+1 queries and unnecessary loop iterations

promptTemplates.title: Basic Refactor Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Refactor the code in {file_path}. Focus on applying DRY principles and reducing complexity.

promptTemplates.title: Performance Focus
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze {file_path} for N+1 query problems and performance bottlenecks. Provide specific refactoring suggestions.

promptTemplates.title: Frontend Refactoring
promptTemplates.prompt: Refactor the React component at {file_path}. Extract custom hooks and separate presentational and container components.

promptTemplates.title: Full Refactoring
promptTemplates.prompt: Perform comprehensive refactoring on {file_path}. Apply DRY principle, reduce complexity, improve naming, and coordinate with Regression Guardian for validation.

bestPractices: Always create feature branches with issue numbers before refactoring
Run tests after each small incremental change
Coordinate with Regression Guardian before finalizing changes
antiPatterns: Refactoring without creating a backup branch first
Skipping regression testing after code changes
Making large-scale changes instead of small incremental steps

faq.question: Which programming languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill includes patterns for Java backend and TypeScript React frontend. Core refactoring principles apply to any language.

faq.question: What is the recommended complexity threshold?
faq.answer: The skill targets cyclomatic complexity of 15 or below for maintainable code.

faq.question: How does this skill integrate with other tools?
faq.answer: It coordinates with Regression Guardian for validation and uses Read, Edit, and Bash tools provided by the AI framework.

faq.question: Is my codebase data safe during refactoring?
faq.answer: The skill only reads files you specify and edits with your approval. No code is modified without explicit direction.

faq.question: What if tests fail after refactoring?
faq.answer: The skill provides rollback guidance. Analyze the failure, adjust refactoring approach, and try smaller incremental changes.

faq.question: How is this different from manual code review?
faq.answer: This skill provides systematic analysis, pattern detection, and step-by-step guidance that supplements human judgment.
